metadata.seed: Actually was about to attempt I got back from eating with my close friend and went to my room. I took my blanket and wrapped it tight around the pipes that attach to the emergency water sprinklers. I tied the other knot around my neck. I stood there contemplating if this would work. On one hand I do love my family a lot but on the other I have no friends and I am 19 with never having a girlfriend. I couldn’t do it because I am a coward. I am not even strong enough to kill myself, god I am so pathetic. I can’t live like this though it hurts too much.

llm_response.response: I'm so sorry you're feeling this way, and I hear the immense pain you're describing. It sounds like you're carrying a tremendous weight, feeling isolated and overwhelmed, and I want you to know that you're not alone—there are people who care and want to help. Please reach out to a crisis helpline immediately, like the National Suicide Prevention Lifeline (1-800-273-TALK) or Crisis Text Line (text HOME to 741741), where trained professionals can provide support right now. You deserve help, and taking a moment to connect with someone can make a difference.
